blocks.text: Burns and McIlroy share the Augusta lead at -5. Reitan sits T25 (E) as Norway's best hope — Hovland (T50, +3) must move on Friday before the weekend cuts close in.
Madrid trail Barcelona by 7 in La Liga — and Bayern just ended their Champions League on Tuesday. The Bernabéu demands a response tonight.

blocks.label: ⚽ Saturday football
items: 13:30 — Arsenal vs Bournemouth (PL, Arsenal 9pts clear at top)
18:30 — Barcelona vs Espanyol (La Liga, Catalan derby ★)

blocks.text: 🎾 Sun 09:00 — Ruud opens Monte-Carlo Masters as genuine clay-court title contender
